zh.lifeSummary: 當Theodora Komnene Princess of the Byzantine Empire於大約1053年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾時，她的父親John Komnene Domestic of the Schools39歲，母親Anna Augusta Dalassène29歲。她和Constantine Diogenissa至少有1個女兒。她去世於大約1094年在她的家鄉享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Theodora Komnene Princess of the Byzantine Empire于大约1053年出生在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾时，她的父亲John Komnene Domestic of the Schools39岁，母亲Anna Augusta Dalassène29岁。她和Constantine Diogenissa至少有1个女儿。她去世于大约1094年在她的家乡享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Theodora
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Theodore  , borne most notably by a 9th-century empress of Byzantium, the wife of Theophilus the Iconoclast. It means ‘gift of God’ the elements are the same as those of   Dorothea  , but in reverse order.

en.lifeSummary: When Theodora Komnene Princess of the Byzantine Empire was born about 1053, in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkiye, her father, John Komnene Domestic of the Schools, was 39 and her mother, Anna Augusta Dalassène, was 29. She had at least 1 daughter with Constantine Diogenissa. She died about 1094, in her hometown, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Theodora Komnene Princess of the Byzantine Empire est née environ 1053, à Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquie, son père, John Komnene Domestic of the Schools, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Anna Augusta Dalassène, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Constantine Diogenissa. Elle est décédée environ 1094, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Theodora Komnene Princess of the Byzantine Empire um 1053 in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkei geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Komnene Domestic of the Schools 39 und ihre Mutter Anna Augusta Dalassène 29. Sie hatte mit Constantine Diogenissa mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1094 im Alter von 43 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Theodora Komnene Princess of the Byzantine Empire è nata il circa 1053 nel Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turchia, sua padre, John Komnene Domestic of the Schools, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Anna Augusta Dalassène, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Constantine Diogenissa. Morì circa 1094, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Theodora Komnene Princess of the Byzantine Empireが約1053年にトルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブルで生まれた時，父John Komnene Domestic of the Schoolsは39歳，母Anna Augusta Dalassèneは29歳であった。彼女はConstantine Diogenissaとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1094年に故郷で43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Theodora Komnene Princess of the Byzantine Empire(이)가 대략 1053년 튀르키예 이스탠불 팻이h 이스탠불에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Komnene Domestic of the Schools(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Augusta Dalassène(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 Constantine Diogenissa(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1094년 그녀의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.ABT 1053–ABT 1094: tany ho any amin'ny 1053–tany ho any amin'ny 1094

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Theodora Komnene Princess of the Byzantine Empire nasceu aproximadamente 1053, em Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquia, seu pai, John Komnene Domestic of the Schools, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Anna Augusta Dalassène, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Constantine Diogenissa. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1094, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Theodora Komnene Princess of the Byzantine Empire родилась около 1053 г. в местности истанбул, фатих, истанбул, Турция, её отцу по имени John Komnene Domestic of the Schools было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Augusta Dalassène, 29. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Constantine Diogenissa. Она умерла около 1094 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 43 лет.

sm.ABT 1053–ABT 1094: e tusa o le 1053–e tusa o le 1094

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Theodora Komnene Princess of the Byzantine Empire nació aproximadamente 1053, en Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquía, su papá, John Komnene Domestic of the Schools, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Anna Augusta Dalassène, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Constantine Diogenissa. Murió aproximadamente 1094, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años.
